es.name: Calculadora CAGR
es.description: Calcula la tasa de crecimiento anual compuesto de una inversión.
es.seo_description: Calcula la tasa de crecimiento anual compuesto de una inversión. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Herramienta gratuita con formula y ejemplos.
es.example_label: Calculating CAGR for investment that grew from $50,000 to $89,000 over 7 years.
es.result_context: The CAGR of {cagr}% represents the smoothed annual growth rate that would produce this result.
mistakes: Using arithmetic average instead of geometric (CAGR) for multi-year returns
Not accounting for cash flows during the investment period
Assuming CAGR reflects actual year-by-year performance
